epic.title: Authentication overhaul
epic.description: Replace the legacy session-cookie auth with token-based auth across all services.

features.title: Token issuance service
features.description: Issue and rotate signed access tokens.

stories.title: Issue access token on login
stories.description: Return a signed JWT on successful credential exchange.
stories.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] POST /login returns 200 with a JWT body field on valid credentials
- [ ] JWT contains sub, exp, iat, scope claims
- [ ] Token signature verifies against the rotating signing key
- [ ] Failed credentials return 401 with no token in the body

stories.title: Rotate signing key nightly
stories.description: Background job rotates the JWT signing key every 24 hours.
stories.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Key rotation runs at 02:00 UTC
- [ ] Previous key is retained for 24h to validate in-flight tokens
- [ ] Rotation is observable via the auth-service metrics dashboard

features.title: Token validation middleware
features.description: Shared middleware for downstream services to validate access tokens.

stories.title: Validate JWT on every request
stories.description: Reject requests with missing, expired, or invalid tokens.
stories.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Missing Authorization header returns 401
- [ ] Expired token returns 401 with WWW-Authenticate: Bearer error="invalid_token"
- [ ] Valid token populates the request user-context object

issues.title: Investigate intermittent 504 on token refresh
issues.description: Standalone bug filed outside the epic hierarchy — no type/* label is injected.
